office_does: A Superior Court judge presides over felony, civil, family, juvenile, probate, and other cases within the court's jurisdiction.
race_blurb: Appointed Judge Jennifer Richardson faces deputy prosecutor Trevor Bevier and private attorney Ken Chadwick for an unexpired term.

candidates.summary: Richardson is the appointed incumbent judge and a career litigator admitted to practice in 2000.
highlights: Currently serves as the Position 3 Superior Court judge [S1][S2]
Brings more than two decades of litigation experience [S2]

experience.basis: Current judicial service and more than two decades of litigation provide the strongest established judicial record.

candidates.summary: Chadwick is a senior private attorney with broad litigation, arbitration, guardian-ad-litem, pro-tem commissioner, business, and law-enforcement experience.
highlights: Has practiced across family, criminal, and civil matters [S2]
Has served as arbitrator, guardian ad litem, and pro tem court commissioner [S2]

experience.basis: Broad legal practice and quasi-judicial roles provide a substantial proven record short of current judgeship.

candidates.summary: Bevier is a deputy prosecutor with civil and county-contract duties following about 14 years in private practice.
highlights: Handles civil litigation, opinions, and contracts for the county [S2]
Previously practiced civil, probate, real-estate, bankruptcy, and injury law [S2]

experience.basis: Public and private legal experience provide a proven professional record but no judicial tenure.
